narrative:
North Olmsted-04-E (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,121 registered voters, with 65.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 8.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.0%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 17.8 percentage points.
